title: How To REALLY Get Over Heartbreak
text: i just want to say thanks to that video it helped so much you have no idea it's a video that needed to be made um i wish that you didn't make it because i wish that you were still with your ex but yeah i feel like it's a video that needs to be made and yeah thank you hi welcome to or welcome back to my channel this is a very highly requested video um i assume if you press on this video you're going through a painful painful heartbreak and i have all the tips for you trust me i just want to start off by saying before i get into everything the reason this video is even being made is because i actually uploaded a first video called um i think it's called i documented three months of heartbreak and i literally like the title says documented three months of heartbreak every single day i would open my camera which probably sounds insane but i was going through lockdown i had gone through a breakup with somebody that i was actually living with i actually struggled a lot with that breakup i lost a lot of weight i was very unhealthy very depressed um that video is very important and very special and it's it gives a lot of really good reassurance because i it was very raw you know before he broke up with me we were like soul mates best friends both living here together and when he left i felt like a part of me was gone and i was doing it by myself in this house where every corner of the house reminded me of him and the only place i could really leave to go to was therapy because we were in lockdown i was going through my breakup during the worst part of lockdown where we weren't allowed to do anything but i wouldn't change it for the world because if i didn't go to those therapy sessions and my therapist didn't tell me hey you know you're really going through it you should document this you should journal or video diary or voice notes so that you can look back at your progress because i promise you you're going to be okay if she didn't tell me that and if i didn't sit down and record those videos i feel like it would have never reached you guys you know i know this sounds crazy but i just felt like the pain i was going through was bigger than me and it was so that i would be able to help other people going

title: How To REALLY Get Over Heartbreak

another person that's gonna love you better yes and are you gonna be okay absolutely you're gonna grow from this you are going to turn into the best version of yourself you might not feel it right now it might not seem like that's the case but i can promise you with all of my heart it is absolutely

title: How To REALLY Get Over Heartbreak
text: gonna be okay absolutely you're gonna grow from this you are going to turn into the best version of yourself you might not feel it right now it might not seem like that's the case but i can promise you with all of my heart it is absolutely what's going to happen with you separate your feelings from facts anyway just a really short backstory i was living with my ex-boyfriend he was my first love we were together for a few years um we would fight like every couple every couple fights but we were very close nonetheless like we were what i thought was a great couple that would never break up i saw myself getting married to him and being with him forever basically the breakup was very one-sided it was very abrupt he literally made the decision to break up with me which is fine i'm not trying to sit here and have a pity party and be like wow guys someone decided to break up with me he's horrible no people are allowed to decide to break up with you that's something that you just have to accept and for whatever reason he didn't want to be with me and he wanted to leave me so he packed all of his stuff he left he blocked me off everything gave me absolutely no closure moved out with a bunch of new people which i ended up finding out were some girls it was just very very painful because i was stuck here in lockdown every single day waiting for months for him to come back i just remember feeling like i couldn't handle it i wasn't gonna be okay and i was never gonna be able to be in this world and in this life where i'm not in love with him and waiting for him to come back so i've put everything into categories i've made phases um this is just like a rough idea of like what you're probably gonna go through going through a really painful breakup this is definitely what i went through and phase one was shock and denial this person that i love so much doesn't want me anymore like i couldn't face the fact that he had left i truly felt like nobody would ever love me again and i could never love anyone else um you feel so small you feel hopeless you know because out of all the people in the world you want this one person so bad and they've left you so it feels like because you feel like who would ever want me if this one person doesn't want me but again like i told you before feelings and facts that's not a fact just because this one person doesn't want you doesn't mean that there's not somebody out there that suits you even better and will love you

title: How To REALLY Get Over Heartbreak

than waiting for somebody that doesn't even want you why would you want somebody that doesn't want

title: How To REALLY Get Over Heartbreak
text: i spent a lot of time crying i spent a lot of time just talking about it and just being hurt and crying on my friend's shoulders and being just sad and vulnerable and anxious but i did also want to get up and do things so i was doing little things to help me you know seeing my friends helped a lot during this stage it helped a lot to have people around me and to do things that just made me
